message_template.content:
You are given a Patient-Doctor medical dialogue. Classify the diagnosis category of the patient's primary complaint into exactly ONE of:
  - Digestion         (stomach, bowel, GI, nausea, vomiting, diarrhea, indigestion, reflux, ulcer)
  - mental disorder   (anxiety, depression, mood, panic, insomnia, psychiatric, bipolar, OCD)
  - childbirth        (pregnancy, labor, delivery, postpartum, fetus, contractions, breastfeeding)
  - others            (anything else)

Output exactly one of: Digestion / mental disorder / childbirth / others. No other text.
